div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🐳 Docker Host / Virtual Machine
--
OS: Linux Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
Docker Engine: 24.0+
Docker Compose: 2.20+
Resources: 8+ GB RAM, 4+ CPUs
Network: cvat bridge network

span.p:
👥 End Users
--
Web Browsers
Mobile Devices
API Clients

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: traefik
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: traefik:v3.6
Hostname: traefik
--
🔌 Ports Exposed:
• 8080:8080 → HTTP Traffic
• 8090:8090 → Dashboard
--
📂 Volumes:
• /var/run/docker.sock:ro
• ./components/analytics/grafana_conf.yml
--
🌐 Environment:
• CVAT_HOST=localhost
• TRAEFIK_PROVIDERS_DOCKER=true
--
🔧 Config:
• Access log: JSON format
• Provider: Docker labels
• Network: cvat

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_ui
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/ui:dev
Hostname: cvat_ui
--
🔌 Internal Port: 8000
--
🏷️ Traefik Labels:
• Host=localhost
• Priority=default route
--
📡 Backend URL:
• http://cvat-server:8080
--
⚡ Tech Stack:
• React 18
• TypeScript 5
• Webpack 5
• Nginx server

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_server
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/server:dev
Hostname: cvat-server
--
🔌 Internal Port: 8080
--
🌐 Environment:
• CVAT_POSTGRES_HOST=cvat_db
• CVAT_REDIS_INMEM_HOST=cvat_redis_inmem
• CVAT_REDIS_ONDISK_HOST=cvat_redis_ondisk
• DJANGO_LOG_SERVER_HOST=vector
• CLICKHOUSE_HOST=clickhouse
• CVAT_ANALYTICS=1
• NUMPROCS=2
--
📂 Volumes Mounted:
• cvat_data → /home/django/data
• cvat_keys → /home/django/keys
• cvat_logs → /home/django/logs
--
🏷️ Traefik Labels:
• Routes: /api/, /static/, /admin
--
🔧 Command:
• init run server
--
🔗 Dependencies:
• cvat_db, cvat_redis_*, cvat_opa

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_opa
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: openpolicyagent/opa:1.12.2
Hostname: opa
--
🔌 Internal Port: 8181
--
🔧 Command:
• run --server
• --addr=:8181
• Bundle URL: http://cvat-server:8080
• Polling: 5-15 seconds
--
📋 Responsibilities:
• Authorization policies
• RBAC evaluation
• Dynamic policy updates

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_worker_import
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/server:dev
--
🌐 Environment: *backend-env
• NUMPROCS=2
--
🔧 Command:
• run worker import
--
📂 Volumes:
• cvat_data, cvat_keys, cvat_logs
--
🔗 Connects to:
• Redis queue 'import'
• PostgreSQL
• Shared storage

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_worker_export
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/server:dev
--
🌐 Environment: *backend-env
• NUMPROCS=2
--
🔧 Command:
• run worker export
--
📂 Volumes:
• cvat_data, cvat_keys, cvat_logs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_worker_annotation
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/server:dev
--
🔧 Command:
• run worker annotation
--
📂 Volumes:
• cvat_data, cvat_keys, cvat_logs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_worker_utils
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/server:dev
--
🔧 Command:
• run worker notifications cleaning
--
📂 Volumes:
• cvat_data, cvat_keys, cvat_logs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_worker_quality_reports
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/server:dev
--
🔧 Command:
• run worker quality_reports

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_worker_webhooks
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/server:dev
--
🔧 Command:
• run worker webhooks

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_worker_chunks
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/server:dev
--
🌐 Environment: NUMPROCS=2
--
🔧 Command:
• run worker chunks

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_worker_consensus
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: cvat/server:dev
--
🔧 Command:
• run worker consensus

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_db
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: postgres:15-alpine
Hostname: cvat_db
--
🔌 Internal Port: 5432
--
🌐 Environment:
• POSTGRES_USER=root
• POSTGRES_DB=cvat
• POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD=trust
--
📂 Volume Mount:
• cvat_db → /var/lib/postgresql/data
--
🔄 Restart Policy: always
--
💾 Stores:
• ~50 database tables
• Users, organizations, projects
• Tasks, jobs, annotations
• Labels, issues, comments

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_redis_inmem
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: redis:7.2.11-alpine
Hostname: cvat_redis_inmem
--
🔌 Internal Port: 6379
--
🔧 Command:
• redis-server
• --save 60 100
• --appendonly yes
--
📂 Volume Mount:
• cvat_inmem_db → /data
--
💾 Stores:
• RQ job queues
• Active jobs metadata
• Job results cache

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_redis_ondisk
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: apache/kvrocks:2.12.1
Hostname: cvat_redis_ondisk
--
🔌 Internal Port: 6666
--
🔧 Command:
• --compact-cron '0 3 * * *'
--
📂 Volume Mount:
• cvat_cache_db → /var/lib/kvrocks
--
⚙️ Init: true (PID 1 reaper)
--
💾 Stores:
• Query result cache
• Search index cache
• API response cache

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_clickhouse
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: clickhouse/clickhouse-server:23.11-alpine
Hostname: clickhouse
--
🔌 Internal Port: 8123
--
🌐 Environment:
• CLICKHOUSE_DB=cvat
• CLICKHOUSE_USER=user
• CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=user
--
📂 Volume Mount:
• cvat_events_db → /var/lib/clickhouse
--
💾 Stores:
• User activity events
• System performance logs
• API call statistics
• Time-series analytics

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_vector
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: timberio/vector:0.26.0-alpine
Hostname: vector
--
🔌 Internal Port: 8282
--
👤 User: 1000:1000
--
📂 Volumes:
• ./components/analytics/vector/vector.toml
→ /etc/vector/vector.toml:ro
• tmpfs → /vector-data-dir
--
🔗 Depends on:
• cvat_clickhouse
--
⚙️ Config:
• Sources: HTTP, logs
• Transforms: JSON parsing
• Sinks: ClickHouse

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Container: cvat_grafana
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Image: grafana/grafana-oss:10.1.2
Hostname: grafana
--
🔌 Internal Port: 3000
--
🌐 Environment:
• GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_ENABLED=true
• GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_ORG_ROLE=Admin
• GF_SERVER_ROOT_URL=/analytics
• GF_INSTALL_PLUGINS=grafana-clickhouse-datasource
--
📂 Volumes:
• ./components/analytics/grafana/dashboards
→ /var/lib/grafana/dashboards:ro
--
📊 Dashboards:
• All Events
• Management
• Monitoring

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
💾 Docker Volume: cvat_data
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Driver: local
Mount path: /home/django/data
--
📦 Content:
• Uploaded images/videos
• Extracted video frames
• Processed chunks
• Thumbnails
• Temporary upload files
• Export archives
• Model files
--
📊 Size: Variable 10GB - 1TB+
--
🔗 Mounted by:
• cvat_server
• All worker containers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔑 Docker Volume: cvat_keys
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Driver: local
Mount path: /home/django/keys
--
📦 Content:
• SSH private/public keys
• API authentication keys
• Cloud storage credentials
• SSL certificates
--
🔒 Security: Restricted access

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📝 Docker Volume: cvat_logs
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Driver: local
Mount path: /home/django/logs
--
📦 Content:
• Django application logs
• gunicorn access logs
• Worker execution logs
• Error stack traces
• Debug information
--
🔄 Rotation: Daily, 10 files max

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🗄️ Docker Volume: cvat_db
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Driver: local
Mount path: /var/lib/postgresql/data
--
📦 Content:
• PostgreSQL database files
• WAL logs
• Table data
• Indexes
--
💾 Size: 1GB - 100GB+

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📦 Docker Volume: cvat_inmem_db
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Driver: local
Mount path: /data
--
📦 Content:
• Redis RDB snapshots
• AOF append-only file
• Job queue persistence
--
⚡ Type: In-memory + disk backup

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
💿 Docker Volume: cvat_cache_db
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Driver: local
Mount path: /var/lib/kvrocks
--
📦 Content:
• Kvrocks on-disk cache
• Query result cache
• Session cache
--
🔧 Compaction: Daily at 3 AM

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📊 Docker Volume: cvat_events_db
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Driver: local
Mount path: /var/lib/clickhouse
--
📦 Content:
• ClickHouse database files
• Events table data
• Time-series indexes
• Compressed analytics logs
--
💾 Size: 500MB - 50GB+
